UG-46  INSPECTION OPENINGS. (a) All pressure vessels shall be provided with suitable inspection openings for examination of the interior, except as permitted by UG-47 for vessels where access is not required. (b) The size and number of inspection openings shall be as specified in this paragraph. (c) Openings for inspection shall meet the requirements of UG-36 and shall be reinforced in accordance with UG-37 when they exceed the unreinforced limits. Inspection shall be performed as required by UG-93. For access openings (manways), see also UG-47. Inspection opening covers shall be suitable for the design pressure in accordance with UG-22 and UG-27.
